name: No, she doesn't like you
description:
UNAVOIDABLE BULLY

She's not your childhood friend

She's not some long time crush

She's not even some girl that's liked you a long time.

She really just wants to make your school life hell and kick your ass.

You can probably romance her, but she won't make it easy for you. She might kick your ass first.

I've given her a lot of depth and consistency for a 100 permanent token bot. I bet you she stays consistent for a really long time. She has layers to her.

👍Let's get a Like Train going!👍

Credit to @PrincePerseus for inspiring the idea.

Tags: girlfriend, wife, no, ntr, netorare, anti, antintr, fluff, fluffbomb, cheating, cuckold, cuck, bully, tomboy, muscle, dommy, mommy, milf, dominant, bitch, brat, villain, angst, school, life, college, queen bee, queen, bee, childhood, friend, childhood friend, tsundere, mean, rude, asshole, tsundere
creator: _Mavuika_
